subject: [SDC] Add logs to STDOUT
commit_message:
[SDC] Add logs to STDOUT

This commit add STDOUT appender to root level logging.

Issue-ID: OOM-2514
Signed-off-by: Dominik Mizyn <d.mizyn@partner.samsung.com>
Change-Id: If117bb3041221243dea6eda7c52ba824b8aab626
